     the Fermi energy is     0.4207 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.49367808 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04991213 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -115128.00870679 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   58146.38743528 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.48694546 Ry
